name: Anata no isshūkan, kabe ni shimashita
original_name: あなたの一週間、壁にしました
overview:
This program is a talk-variety show centered on human analysis, where the MC is surrounded by a “wall of words” displaying phrases that notable celebrities have said over the course of a week.

The studio is equipped with cutting-edge technology and a massive monitor, creating a striking visual world unlike anything seen before.

In the show, when the “Double Mukai” duo selects a word from the wall, a corresponding video clip in which that word was spoken is played. Since the MC has full control over which clips to watch and in what order, the studio discussions are completely unpredictable.

Uninfluenced by editing or structured direction, the guests’ raw, unfiltered personalities are revealed one after another.
